name: Turret Titans
short_description: Turret Titans is a classic defense game where you take on hordes of enemies with your powerful machine gun! Fight boats, helicopters, trucks, and insurgents across 5 intense levels, defending your position from relentless waves of attackers.
detailed_description: Turret Titans is an intense defense game where you take on hordes of enemies with your powerful machine gun. Fight off boats, helicopters, trucks, and insurgents across 5 challenging levels. Each level brings new enemies and obstacles, testing your reflexes and strategy. With no upgrades to manage, the focus is purely on skill and quick thinking as you fight to protect your position from relentless attacks. Can you survive the onslaught and defeat all enemies in Turret Titans?
about_the_game: Turret Titans is an intense defense game where you take on hordes of enemies with your powerful machine gun. Fight off boats, helicopters, trucks, and insurgents across 5 challenging levels. Each level brings new enemies and obstacles, testing your reflexes and strategy. With no upgrades to manage, the focus is purely on skill and quick thinking as you fight to protect your position from relentless attacks.
